opening.agent_intro: I'm your family dining consultant. I can create personalized meal plans based on your taste preferences and family needs.
opening.q3: What are some low-calorie diet-friendly dishes
opening.q4: Help me order some chicken breast and broccoli on Hema
orchestrator.error.no_match: Sorry, I couldn't find a matching agent for your request. Please try rephrasing.
comm.error.no_permission: Agent '{source}' is not allowed to call '{target}'
tool.shopping_list.desc: Generate shopping list from dish names
tool.param.dish_names: List of dish names to generate shopping list for
tool.meal_recommend.desc: Recommend meals based on user profile
tool.param.meal_type: Type of meal (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snack)
tool.param.max_results: Maximum number of results to return
comm.tool.agent_list.desc: List all loaded Agents and their capabilities
comm.tool.agent_call.desc: Call another Agent to execute a task. Requires target Agent name and request message.
comm.tool.agent_call.param.message: Natural language request to send to the target Agent
